title: Generative AI Adoption
description: Share of U.S. working-age adults (18–64) using generative AI at work, from a nationally representative quarterly survey (Real-Time Population Survey). Work adoption (40.7%) lags overall use (55.9%), consistent with workers adopting ahead of their employers. Overall adoption has outpaced both the PC and internet at comparable points post-launch.

overlays.label: Workday Davos: 59% of depts using AI + 31% experimenting (n=2,500)
21 developers studied at cutting edge of AI use in software development
Workday: 85% of employees save 1–7 hrs/wk with AI (n=3,200)
Workday: >90% of daily AI users believe it will help them succeed
AI skills increase interview invitations by 8-15 percentage points
Linear: PMs/marketers should do 80-100% of work via AI interface

sources.title: The Rapid Adoption of Generative AI
sources.excerpt: Nationally representative survey of 25,000+ working-age adults finds generative AI adoption reached 55.9% overall and 40.7% at work by November 2025, outpacing PC and internet adoption at comparable points post-launch.

sources.title: GenAI Adoption Tracker (Harvard / St. Louis Fed)
sources.excerpt: Quarterly dashboard tracking generative AI adoption among U.S. working-age adults. Feb & May 2025 values estimated from tracker chart; all other values from published working paper.

sources.title: January 2026 US Labor Market Update: Jobs Mentioning AI Are Growing Amid Broader Hiring Weakness
sources.excerpt: Only about 43% of US workers reported regularly using AI at work last year

sources.title: Beyond Productivity: Measuring the Real Value of AI
sources.excerpt: 85% of employees report saving one to seven hours per week using AI. Employees who use AI every day are overwhelmingly optimistic – more than 90% believe it will help them succeed.

sources.title: Elevating Human Potential: The AI Skills Revolution
sources.excerpt: almost two-thirds (59%) say their department is currently using AI while one-third (31%) of respondents are experimenting with its use

sources.title: Your New Job Is to Onboard AI Agents: How AI Native Companies Actually Operate
sources.excerpt: PMs and marketers should default to an AI interface. These functions should be doing 80-100% of their work through a chat interface.

sources.title: AI Skills Improve Job Prospects: Causal Evidence from a Hiring Experiment
sources.excerpt: AI skills significantly increase interview invitation probabilities by approximately 8 to 15 percentage points, compared with candidates without such skills

sources.title: What do professional software developers need to know to succeed in an age of Artificial Intelligence?
sources.excerpt: We describe our research with 21 developers at the cutting edge of using AI
